definition.name: almost-idempotent
definition.definition: A positive unital map Phi:B(H)_sa->B(H)_sa is almost idempotent with defect eta if ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta, eta in [0,1/4), where ||.|| is the order-unit operator norm of the map on B(H)_sa. [def-almost-idempotent, report sec:spectral eq:eta-hypothesis]
